creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
bms         2009-03-18 15:18:53 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository (src committer)

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/igmpproxy        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    net/igmpproxy/files  igmpproxy.in patch-freebsd 
  Log:
  Add new port igmpproxy.
  This is an IGMPv2 aware multicast forwarding proxy.
  It cannot be run simultaneously with other multicast
  routing daemons.
  
  PR:             ports/130174
  Submitted by:   Alexander Chernikov
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2088    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +41 -0     ports/net/igmpproxy/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/igmpproxy/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/net/igmpproxy/files/igmpproxy.in (new)
  1.1       +1082 -0   ports/net/igmpproxy/files/patch-freebsd (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/net/igmpproxy/pkg-descr (new)
